data.body: Investigated (debug-everything session): working-as-designed — no code fix possible. Evidence: CLAUDE.md explicitly documents inline dispatch as the intended permanent approach. The Claude Code Agent tool's subagent_type parameter only accepts built-in types (general-purpose, Explore, Plan, etc.) by design. dso:* agent types are intended to be dispatched by reading the agent .md files inline and using subagent_type='general-purpose'. No architectural change is possible without changes to the Claude Code Agent tool itself. Leaving OPEN per debug-everything protocol (no code change = no close).
